items.title: Replace keyword search with FAISS embeddings
items.description: Create EmbeddingKnowledgeBase using sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and FAISS IndexFlatIP. Reuse existing chunking logic. Keep format_context() API compatible.
acceptance_criteria: EmbeddingKnowledgeBase class loads .md files and builds FAISS index
search() returns results with cosine similarity scores
format_context() returns same format as current
Works with existing triage_flow.py without changes

items.title: Redis session persistence
items.description: Create RedisSessionStore with get/save/delete and TTL 7 days. Update triage_flow.py to use Redis instead of _sessions dict. Add REDIS_URL to config.py. Fallback to in-memory if Redis unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: REDIS_URL added to config.py with default None
Graceful fallback to in-memory when Redis unavailable

items.title: Structured logging with structlog
items.description: Replace logging.basicConfig with structlog JSON configuration. Add structured log events for triage decisions, escalations, and session lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: All logger calls use structured fields (session_id, decision, etc.)
No breaking changes to existing log consumption

items.title: Update requirements.txt and Dockerfile
items.description: Add sentence-transformers, faiss-cpu, redis, structlog to requirements.txt. Update Dockerfile with torch CPU-only install, libgomp1, and model download step.
acceptance_criteria: requirements.txt includes all new dependencies with versions
Dockerfile installs torch CPU-only from pytorch/whl/cpu
Dockerfile downloads all-MiniLM-L6-v2 at build time

items.title: Adaptive Cards service
items.description: Create card builder functions using Adaptive Card schema v1.5 with Action.Execute. Include welcome, explanation, escalation, feedback, and menu cards. All cards must have fallbackText.

items.title: Invoke activity handler
items.description: Add on_invoke_activity() to TriageBot. Handle adaptiveCard/action verbs, task/fetch, and task/submit. Route card actions through triage_flow process_turn().
acceptance_criteria: Verb routing: login_issue, feature_question, system_error, escalate, feedback_yes, feedback_no, back_to_menu
task/submit processes form data through triage
Text messages still work alongside card interactions

items.title: Integrate cards with triage flow
items.description: Add suggested_actions field to TriageStep. Update process_turn() to include action buttons based on decision type. Update app.py on_message_activity to send cards when suggested_actions is present.
acceptance_criteria: app.py sends Adaptive Card when suggested_actions present

items.title: Task Module for problem reporting
items.description: Add build_problem_form_card() with Input.ChoiceSet (category), Input.Text (description), Input.ChoiceSet (urgency). Wire task/submit handler to process form through triage.
acceptance_criteria: Form card with category, description, and urgency fields
Form data fed to process_turn() as structured message
Response card shown after form submission

items.title: Update Teams manifest
items.description: Update manifest.json to support Adaptive Cards invoke activities. Add webApplicationInfo for future Graph API permissions.

items.title: Confidence scoring
items.description: Create ConfidenceMetrics dataclass with weighted scoring (retrieval 35%, coverage 20%, entropy 25%, relevance 20%). Apply thresholds to triage decisions.

items.title: Sentiment / frustration detection
items.description: Create FRUSTRATION_PATTERNS keyword dict. Implement detect_frustration() returning 0-1 score. Track frustration across session turns. Trigger escalation rules.
acceptance_criteria: Escalation triggers: >0.7 first msg, >0.5 + 2+ questions, explicit request

items.title: Warm handoff with EscalationContext
items.description: Create EscalationContext dataclass with full conversation metadata. Generate conversation summary via LLM. Build escalation Adaptive Card. Replace plain-text escalation in app.py.
acceptance_criteria: Rich escalation card replaces plain-text message
Context transferred to support agent via proactive message

items.title: Rate limiting
items.description: Create RateLimiter class with sliding window (10 req/min per conversation_id). Apply in app.py before triage processing.
acceptance_criteria: RateLimiter with configurable max_requests and window
No performance impact on normal usage

items.title: BM25 hybrid search + RRF
items.description: Implement BM25Retriever for sparse retrieval. Implement reciprocal_rank_fusion(). Create HybridRetriever combining dense FAISS + sparse BM25. Wire into knowledge_base.

items.title: Cross-encoder reranking
items.description: Add Reranker class with cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2. Apply after hybrid retrieval. Configurable top_k.

items.title: Prometheus metrics + health check
items.description: Add Prometheus counters, histograms, gauges. Add /metrics and /health aiohttp endpoints. Instrument process_turn() with latency tracking.

items.title: Dockerfile and deployment updates
items.description: Update Dockerfile with proper HEALTHCHECK, signal handling, and optimized layers. Ensure production-ready.
acceptance_criteria: Proper signal handling for graceful shutdown
Optimized layer caching for dependencies vs code
